name: Gavin
typical outfit: dark blue suit with a white shirt and blue tie
typical expression: smirk, I know all kind of look
description: Useless, pointless FOK, highly educated - MBA in business but cannot get anyone to adopt his ideas. Promoted really fast, with no merit. He’s Ken son. He’s always trying to show he’s the boss. He’s a real blocker - everything has to go through.
